info.title: Tuck API
info.description:
Open-source Kubernetes-native secrets manager. Single binary, no external DB.

**Auth:** Set `X-Tuck-Token` header on all requests except those marked `security: []`.

**LIST method:** Endpoints that enumerate keys use the non-standard `LIST` HTTP verb. In curl: `curl -X LIST`. In the spec these are represented as `get` operations on paths ending in `/`.

tags.name: sys
tags.description: System operations (seal, unseal, rotate, snapshot, config)

tags.name: kv
tags.description: KV v1 and KV v2 secret storage

tags.name: auth-token
tags.description: Token auth — create, look up, renew, revoke

tags.name: auth-approle
tags.description: AppRole auth — machine-to-machine with RoleID + SecretID

capabilities.description: Bitmask: read=1, write=2, delete=4, list=8, sudo=16, deny=32

post.summary: Seal the server (drops DEK from memory)
Rotate root key — re-wraps DEK, returns new Shamir shares if applicable
